questions.reference_script: Attention, please. The Central City Public Library is pleased to announce that our newly renovated reading room will reopen to the public this Monday. The renovated space features additional study desks, faster wireless internet, and a quiet zone for individual work. To celebrate the reopening, we will be offering free guided tours, author talks, and children's story sessions throughout the week. We look forward to welcoming all of our members back very soon.

Are you looking for a convenient way to stay healthy this year? At Greenfield Fitness Center, our experienced trainers will help you build a personal exercise plan that fits your goals and your schedule. Members enjoy unlimited access to our modern gym, swimming pool, and group classes, as well as free parking and towel service. Sign up before the end of the month, and your registration fee will be completely waived. Start your journey to a healthier life today.

questions.prompt: Describe the picture in as much detail as you can.
Describe the picture in as much detail as you can.

Imagine that a food magazine is doing research about cooking at home. You have agreed to take part in a telephone interview. How often do you cook meals at home, and what time of day do you usually cook?
When you want to learn to cook a new dish, where do you usually find the recipe, and why do you prefer that source?
Do you think it is better to cook meals at home or to eat at restaurants? Give reasons and examples to support your answer.
Hello, I'm a new employee attending the training day next week. I misplaced the agenda. What time does the program start, and where do we gather first?
questions.provided_info:
New Employee Training Day — Thursday, September 12 (Head Office, 4th Floor)
8:30 AM   Welcome and Registration (Main Lobby)
9:00 AM   Company Overview and History (Room 401, Ms. Diana Reyes)
10:30 AM  Workplace Safety Briefing (Room 402, Mr. Alan Brooks)
12:00 PM  Lunch (Staff Cafeteria)
1:00 PM   Software and Systems Training (Computer Lab, Mr. Alan Brooks)
3:00 PM   Team Introductions and Office Tour (Meeting starts in Room 401)
4:30 PM   Question and Answer Session (Room 401, Ms. Diana Reyes)

questions.prompt: Smartphones have changed the way people communicate with one another. Do you think smartphones have had a mostly positive or a mostly negative effect on the way people communicate? Give specific reasons and examples to support your opinion.
